theme_info.title: myACNH (Night v.)
theme_info.author: mp3li
theme_info.description: An Animal Crossing New Horizons theme for the Innioasis Y1 mp3 player. License: This theme may not be taken and hosted elsewhere. The only download location of this theme is the original creator, mp3li, on their Patreon. Community members may edit and change mp3li themes as long as they credit mp3li in their config description and public description.
